message:
polish(raptorq): scroll-reveal sections, gradient dividers, and hero refinements

Sections fade in with a 32px translate-up as they enter the viewport
(IntersectionObserver, respects prefers-reduced-motion). Dividers use a
transparent-edge gradient instead of a solid line. Hero scroll indicator
fades out on scroll and the badge dot switches from ping to pulse for a
subtler feel. Adds focus-visible outlines for viz buttons and a cyan
text-selection color scoped to the article.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
